languages.text: "Жизнеформа "генетор Ферренц" чрезвычайно взбудоражена обнаруженным дополнением к генеалогическому древу династии фон Валанциус. Запрашиваю разрешение на внесение соответствующих изменений в архивы Сектора Бионика".

"The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."
languages.original_text: "Жизнеформа "генетор Ферренц" чрезвычайно взбудоражена обнаруженным дополнением к генеалогическому древу династии фон Валанциус. Запрашиваю разрешение на внесение соответствующих изменений в архивы Сектора Бионика".

traits.locale_text: "The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."

"The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."

"The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."

languages.text: “‘基因士费伦茨’生命体，因冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的族谱树上出现了新成员，而表现得极度不安。我请求对仿生区的档案进行相应修订。”
languages.original_text: "The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."

traits.locale_text: “‘基因士费伦茨’生命体，因冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的族谱树上出现了新成员，而表现得极度不安。我请求对仿生区的档案进行相应修订。”

languages.text: «La forma de vida "genetor Ferrenz" se siente extremadamente angustiada por la nueva incorporación al árbol genealógico de la dinastía Von Valancius. Solicito permiso para efectuar los cambios pertinentes en los archivos del Sector Bionica».
languages.original_text: "The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."

traits.locale_text: «La forma de vida "genetor Ferrenz" se siente extremadamente angustiada por la nueva incorporación al árbol genealógico de la dinastía Von Valancius. Solicito permiso para efectuar los cambios pertinentes en los archivos del Sector Bionica».

languages.text: « L'entité genetor Ferrenz est profondément choquée de découvrir cette nouvelle entrée dans l'arbre généalogique de la dynastie von Valancius. Je vous demande l'autorisation d'effectuer les changements nécessaires dans les archives du secteur Bionica. »
languages.original_text: "The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."

traits.locale_text: « L'entité genetor Ferrenz est profondément choquée de découvrir cette nouvelle entrée dans l'arbre généalogique de la dynastie von Valancius. Je vous demande l'autorisation d'effectuer les changements nécessaires dans les archives du secteur Bionica. »

languages.text: "Die Lebensform 'Genetor Ferrenz' ist extrem besorgt ob des neu entdeckten genealogischen Stammbaums der Dynastie derer von Valancius. Ich erbitte Erlaubnis, die entsprechenden Änderungen an den Archiven des Sektors Bionica vorzunehmen."
languages.original_text: "The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."

traits.locale_text: "Die Lebensform 'Genetor Ferrenz' ist extrem besorgt ob des neu entdeckten genealogischen Stammbaums der Dynastie derer von Valancius. Ich erbitte Erlaubnis, die entsprechenden Änderungen an den Archiven des Sektors Bionica vorzunehmen."

languages.text: "'Genetör Ferrenz' yaşam formu, von Valancius hanedanlığının soy ağacına yeni eklenen bu kimseden son derece rahatsız oldu. Sektör Biyonika arşivlerinde uygun değişiklikleri yapmak için izin talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."

traits.locale_text: "'Genetör Ferrenz' yaşam formu, von Valancius hanedanlığının soy ağacına yeni eklenen bu kimseden son derece rahatsız oldu. Sektör Biyonika arşivlerinde uygun değişiklikleri yapmak için izin talep ediyorum."

languages.text: 「フォン・ヴァランシウス家の系譜に新たに発見された人物は、生命体「ジェネト・フェレンツ」に極めて大きな影響を与えています。セクター・ビオニカのアーカイブに適切な変更を加えることを許可するよう、お願い申し上げます。」
languages.original_text: "The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."

traits.locale_text: 「フォン・ヴァランシウス家の系譜に新たに発見された人物は、生命体「ジェネト・フェレンツ」に極めて大きな影響を与えています。セクター・ビオニカのアーカイブに適切な変更を加えることを許可するよう、お願い申し上げます。」
